title: Implement Per-User Permission Overrides (MVVM + EF Core)
goal: Build the backend logic and MVVM bindings to hide specific modules from specific staff members based on SuperAdmin configuration.
notes: LOCKED PLAN: Must use EF Core (AppDbContext) and RuntimeSchemaBootstrapper. NO raw SQL.
LOCKED PLAN: Must use BooleanToVisibilityConverter for sidebar buttons. NO code-behind toggles.
LOCKED PLAN: SuperAdmin is exempt. Default access is true if no row exists.
LOCKED PLAN: UI for editing permissions must use DialogHost overlay, not a new popup window.
